active_projects.description: Create zed/examples/epi-study/ directory that organizes and documents the synthetic RCT study produced by task 20, as a demo for new users to understand how to run the /epi command to create an epi study.

Update /home/benjamin/.config/zed/README.md and the other documentation in /home/benjamin/.config/zed/docs/README.md and /home/benjamin/.config/zed/docs/ to reflect that this is a configuration for working in R and Python with Claude Code in the Zed IDE.

artifacts.summary: Identifies 7 user-facing doc files needing reframing from macOS/epidemiology focus to R/Python + Claude Code in Zed, with dual-platform notes and cross-links to existing R.md and python.md language guides.
5-phase plan to reframe README, docs index, docs/general/*, docs/workflows/README, and audit settings.json for macOS-only R/Python Zed configuration.
macOS-only R/Python/Claude Code Zed doc reframing across 10 files.

active_projects.completion_summary: Reframed repository documentation and settings.json from an epidemiology/macOS framing to a macOS-only Zed IDE configuration for R and Python with Claude Code, surfacing the existing R.md and python.md guides and removing all NixOS-specific paths from user-facing docs and configs.

active_projects.description: Simple test RCT study on fake generated data to verify R and Python are configured correctly in Zed and identify configuration shortcomings.

forcing_data.research_question: Does ketamine assisted therapy improve recovery from methamphetamine use disorder?
forcing_data.causal_structure: Treatment -> Recovery, confounded by baseline severity and demographics

artifacts.summary: Study design report for test RCT: ketamine-assisted therapy for methamphetamine use disorder with synthetic data generation plan and Zed configuration assessment
7-phase plan for synthetic RCT (ketamine vs TAU for meth use disorder) exercising R/Python/Quarto toolchains in Zed
Implementation summary with toolchain scoreboard and consolidated gap list
Prioritized Zed R/Python/Quarto config gap remediation list with nix snippets

active_projects.completion_summary: Task 20 completed: synthetic RCT pipeline executed successfully as a Zed R/Python/Quarto toolchain verification on NixOS. All 7 phases finished with graceful fallbacks (base R only, no Quarto). Primary deliverable is the prioritized configuration gap log (logs/config_gaps.md) identifying missing R packages (tidyverse, survival, gtsummary, mice, languageserver), Python modules (scipy, statsmodels), and Quarto, with concrete nix remediation snippets and recommended Zed settings.json additions.
roadmap_items: Install R package set (tidyverse, survival, gtsummary, broom, mice, knitr, rmarkdown, languageserver, styler, lintr) via configuration.nix rWrapper
Install Python scientific extras (scipy, statsmodels, seaborn, scikit-learn, pyarrow) via nix profile
Install Quarto (pkgs.quarto) and verify rmarkdown/jupyter engines
Register r-languageserver in Zed settings.json and verify LSP features interactively
Create project-level flake.nix for reproducible per-task R/Python environments
